name: coinor-libcbc3.1
title: coinor-libcbc3.1
summary: Coin-or branch-and-cut mixed integer programming solver (shared libraries)
description:
Coin-or branch-and-cut mixed integer programming solver (shared libraries)
Cbc (Coin-or branch and cut) is an open-source mixed integer programming
solver written in C++. It can be used as a callable library or as a
stand-alone executable.
.
This package contains the shared libraries.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use coinor-libcbc3.1 because Coin-or branch-and-cut mixed integer programming solver (shared libraries).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use coinor-libcbc3.1 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair coinor-libcbc3.1 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `coinor-libcbc3.1 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
